suppress.notes: The cve.org records for these CVEs indicate that they only apply to httpcore 5.x, but the NVD records state that they apply to all versions up to and including 5.4.2. Discussion at https://github.com/dependency-check/DependencyCheck/issues/8653 suggests NVD need to update their records to exclude versions before 5.x, but there is a suggestion that it could also affect 4.4.16. Apache httpcore 4 is EOL (https://hc.apache.org/httpcomponents-core-4.4.x/index.html) so there may not be any more releases of it.
